steps.title: Use identical lines
steps.content: A system has infinitely many solutions only when the two equations describe the same line. That means the second equation must have the same slope as the given equation.

steps.title: Read the given slope
steps.content:
The equation is in slope-intercept form:
$$
y=\frac{2}{9}x+8
$$
The coefficient of $x$ is the slope, so the required slope is $\frac{2}{9}$.

steps.title: Match the slope
steps.content: The choice with slope $\frac{2}{9}$ is Choice C. The answer is C.
